title: Fallout Foods Mod
description: Adds realistic bunker/war Food Items for war roleplay and more!
body:
⚠️ Important Disclaimer

Fallout Foods Mod is not affiliated with the other mod listed on Modrinth with a similar name:
https://modrinth.com/mod/fallout-foods

These are two separate projects with different authors, features, and goals.

Please do not report issues, feature requests, or feedback for this mod to the other mod’s page, and vice versa.

Thank you for understanding! 💛

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🍖 Fallout Foods Mod

A small Forge 1.20.1 mod that adds simple, post-apocalyptic themed food items to Minecraft.

No complicated systems.
No worldgen.
No loot tables.
Just survival-style food items that feel like they belong in a bunker.

🥫 Added Items

Canned Meat:
A preserved protein classic. Reliable and filling.

Crust Biscuits:
Dry, tough, and probably older than your world save.

Dry Wheat:
Emergency food at its most basic. Not great, but edible.

Mysterious Ration:
Nobody knows what’s inside. It’s food… probably.

Bunker Can:
Standard-issue underground survival supply.

Trench Rations:
Field food built for harsh conditions.

All items are fully functional food items with custom textures.

⚙ Current State

At the moment, items are obtainable via:

/give

or

Fallout Foods Creative Tab


Recipe integration and survival balancing may be added in a future update.
